description_long: This is a rectangular table with a thick, marble-patterned tabletop that exudes a modern and elegant aesthetic. The tabletop features a white base with prominent gray and black veining, reminiscent of high-quality Carrara marble. Supporting the tabletop are four sturdy, straight legs made of what appears to be black metal, providing both stability and a contemporary contrast to the light-colored surface. The table's design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible embellishments or additional features such as drawers or shelves. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for dining, working, or communal use in urban environments. The overall construction appears robust, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern rectangular table with a thick, white marble-patterned top and four black metal legs. The design is minimalist and sturdy, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the marble-patterned tabletop and all four black legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the thickness of the marble-patterned surface, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the marble-patterned surface and all four legs from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tabletop's depth and thickness, with two legs visible.
